spacing_and_layout.menu_layout: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-[#0a0a0f] to-[#1a0a2e]
spacing_and_layout.canvas_wrapper: relative w-full max-w-5xl aspect-video mx-auto border border-[#7c3aed]/40 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(124,58,237,0.15)] overflow-hidden bg-[#0a0a0f]

surfaces_and_borders.card: bg-[#1a0a2e]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-[#7c3aed]/30 hover:border-[#00ffcc] transition-colors duration-300
surfaces_and_borders.hud_panel: bg-[#0a0a0f]/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#7c3aed]/20 px-4 py-2
surfaces_and_borders.button: bg-transparent text-[#00ffcc] border-2 border-[#00ffcc] hover:bg-[#00ffcc] hover:text-[#0a0a0f] transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] px-8 py-4 font-bold shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,204,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(0,255,204,0.6)]

components.main_menu: Centered layout with dramatic 'Cormorant Garamond' title, heavy glowing text-shadow. Lore intro in 'Outfit'. CTA button using the surface_and_borders.button style. Background is deep black to dark purple.
components.upgrade_screen: Bento grid of 3 cards in the center of the screen, displayed between floors. Cards use Glassmorphism logic, 1px border. Use Shadcn Card component customized with Tailwind. High focus state visibility.
components.hud: Fixed layer on top of Canvas. Health bar (accent_red), Combo counter (bright_purple), Floor counter (accent_teal). Uses 'JetBrains Mono' for terminal/tech readout feel.
components.game_over: Fullscreen overlay bg-black/90. Red and purple glowing text. Stats displayed centrally. Includes Restart button.
components.boss_warning: Full screen overlay flashing danger red borders (`animate-pulse border-8 border-[#ff3366]`). 'LURKER APPROACHES' in giant 'Cormorant Garamond' text.

animations.card_entrance: staggered fade up for upgrade cards

game_canvas_mechanics.visual_style: Draw game elements using Canvas 2D primitives. Utilize `shadowBlur` and `shadowColor` on the Canvas context to create neon glowing effects on dark background.
game_canvas_mechanics.player_maytradalis: Represent as a dark purple rectangle with a white frill accent line and grey base. Scythe is a large sweeping arc or line in Teal (#00ffcc) and Bright Purple (#a855f7) glow.
game_canvas_mechanics.enemies: Dimensional demons: jagged polygons or red/dark purple rectangles with dark aura (heavy shadowBlur).
game_canvas_mechanics.background: Draw a starfield or floating geometric debris in the background layer of the canvas, moving slowly with parallax.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize a React frontend and FastAPI backend if leaderboard is implemented, otherwise keep logic on frontend.
Use standard Tailwind CSS and custom classes for the UI overlays (Menu, Upgrade, Game Over).
In index.html, import Google Fonts: 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Outfit', and 'JetBrains Mono'.
Implement the game loop inside a React `useEffect` using `requestAnimationFrame`, or build a separate class for the GameEngine that binds to a canvas ref.
Player controls: WASD or Arrows to move, Space to Jump/Double Jump, Shift to Dash (with brief i-frames), J for light attack, K for heavy attack.
Implement a Combo system that increments on enemy hit and resets if time passes without hits.
Implement floor progression: clear wave -> pause game -> show Upgrade UI -> user selects -> resume game -> next floor.
Every 5 floors, trigger the Boss Warning UI overlay and spawn a boss entity with massive health.
Ensure all interactive UI elements (Play button, Upgrade cards, Restart button) have robust `data-testid` attributes.
Do NOT use external images for the canvas rendering as none were successfully fetched. Solely rely on Canvas Context2D primitive drawing methods paired with rich glowing shadow colors.
